arts.ttl: Mark Viduka breaks football exile to rave about Celtic 'institution' but polarising striker sends a Zagreb warning
arts.sum: The Aussie adopted Croat runs a Zagreb coffee shop and will be at the Maksimir Stadium for Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Fraserburgh player makes superb Celtic admission after drawing Rangers in the Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Fraserburgh’s Aidan Sopel admits he ‘grew up a Celtic fan’ after Scottish Cup Rangers draw Dominant in the league and with Celtic facing Rangers in the League Cup final, Hoops boss Brendan Rodgers now has a Scottish Cup Celtic Park tie against Kilmarnock to look forward to in his bid to try and win another treble this season.

arts.ttl: Celtic ‘in pole position’ in race to sign player – Brendan Rodgers’ side looking at January deal
arts.sum: Celtic have included Chelsea’s Carney Chukwuemeka in their target list, and Brendan Rodgers’ side would have to battle it out with AC Milan for his signature. That’s according to Calciomercato, and they cover the latest on Celtic and Milan’s interest in the 21-year-old. He hasn’t managed to cement a place at Chelsea, clocking in 63 The post Celtic ‘in pole position’ in race to sign player – Brendan Rodgers’ side looking at January deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Rangers supremo 'doing a Gio' vs Celtic agitates a worried Ibrox insider – 'I find it really strange'
arts.sum: Derek Ferguson has been hit a dose of deja vu and he doesn't like it ahead of a blockbuster week.

arts.ttl: 50 Cent makes Celtic pledge and shares Hollywood star who 'is crazy' about Bhoys
arts.sum: And now, another superstar has thrown his Celtic hat into the ring as 50 Cent reveals his plan to take in a Parkhead fixture with a familiar Hollywood face when he attends next year’s TRNSMT festival in Scotland. 50 Cent plans to attend Celtic match with Gerard Butler

arts.ttl: Right time for Celtic with Dinamo in disarray?
arts.sum: Celtic face Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League at a time when the Croats are suffering a poor run of form and an injury crisis, writes Alasdair Lamont.

arts.ttl: 'Unbelievable...' Kris Boyd and James McFadden stunned after watching back what Celtic star has done
arts.sum: Understandably, the big Dane took the headlines, in that regard, but it was Kyogo Furuhashi who left James McFadden and Kris Boyd amazed. Boyd hailed it as ‘unbelievable’, whilst McFadden highlighted how the Japan star is the one usually ‘tiring’ defences, then Idah comes on and scores.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE as Rangers and Celtic plus Hearts, Hibs and Aberdeen eye signings
arts.sum: Your one stop shop for every rumour and done deal is right here so look no further

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart and two former Grade One SFA referees verdict on potential Arne Engels' Celtic red card vs Hibs
arts.sum: VAR deemed the challenge not to be a red card but that is not a view that has been shared as two ex-SFA referees and Michael Stewart deliver differing verdicts on whether or not the Celtic midfielder should have been sent for an early bath. And replying to a fan saying that based on Hibs pair Jonathan Obita and Joe Newell’s red cards earlier in the season, Engels should have been sent off, it appears both former referees agree.

arts.ttl: Rodgers confirms Schmeichel Celtic contract extension clause
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers has confirmed Celtic hold the option to trigger a contract extension for Kasper Schmeichel.
